description: Use this API to return data for a specified block of a specified switched shunt. This API routine was first introduced in release 35.0.0. ierr, istat, nstep, rval = swsblk_2(ibus, id, iblk, string)
python_syntax: ierr, istat, nstep, rval = swsblk_2(ibus, id, iblk, string)

parameters.name: string
parameters.description: String indicating the switched shunt quantity desired. (input).

return_values.name: rval
return_values.description: Admittance value indicated by string, per step in block “iblk”. (output).

string.description: Admittance in Mvar per step in block “IBLK”.
Zero sequence admittance in pu per step in block “IBLK”.
Zero sequence admittance in Mvar per step in block “IBLK”.

error_codes.description: Switched shunt not found; ‘ISTAT’, ‘NSTEP’ and ‘RVAL’ unchanged.
Bus type code greater than or equal to 4; ‘ISTAT’, ‘NSTEP’ and ‘RVAL’ returned.
Sequence data not in case when STRING is ‘PU_ZSTEP’ or ‘MVAR_ZSTEP’; ‘ISTAT’, ‘NSTEP’ and ‘RVAL’ returned.
